mapper.select: SELECT staff_id, user_id, name, gender, birth_date, origin, id_card, avatar, resume, work_experience, hourly_rate, rating, verification_status, create_time, update_time FROM staff WHERE staff_id = #{staffId}

SELECT staff_id, user_id, name, gender, birth_date, origin, id_card, avatar, resume, work_experience, hourly_rate, rating, verification_status, create_time, update_time FROM staff WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO staff (user_id, name, gender, birth_date, origin, id_card, avatar, resume, work_experience, hourly_rate, rating, verification_status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{origin}, #{idCard}, #{avatar}, #{resume}, #{workExperience}, #{hourlyRate}, #{rating}, #{verificationStatus})
